message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate 10 more stub modules to ZigBuilder (batch 5)

Migrated modules:
- dbm_mod.zig - Unix database interfaces
- compileall_mod.zig - Byte-compile libraries
- graphlib_mod.zig - Topological sorting (large struct)
- html_parser_mod.zig - HTML parsing
- imghdr_mod.zig - Image type detection
- profile_mod.zig - Performance profiling
- quopri_mod.zig - Quoted-Printable encoding
- sched_mod.zig - Event scheduler
- spwd_mod.zig - Shadow password database
- trace_mod.zig - Execution tracing

Progress: 47/308 modules migrated (15%)
